name: TinyRaven
description: Open-source, self-hosted, drop-in alternative to Tinybird. Single Go binary (tr) in front of OSS ClickHouse + Redis.

TR_HTTP_ADDR.description: Address the tr server binds to. On Heroku the router injects $PORT, so bind all interfaces on it.

TR_CLICKHOUSE_HTTP.description: ClickHouse HTTP endpoint (external — ClickHouse Cloud or your own server). Example: https://abc.clickhouse.cloud:8443

TR_CLICKHOUSE_NATIVE.description: ClickHouse native TCP endpoint host:port used for inserts. Example: abc.clickhouse.cloud:9440

TR_CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD.description: ClickHouse password (leave blank for no auth).

TR_ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Bootstrap admin bearer token — keep this secret.

TR_PROJECT_DIR.description: Path to .datasource/.pipe project files inside the dyno.
